title: BetterHome
body:
# BetterHome Plugin

The BetterHome plugin enhances your Minecraft experience by allowing players to set and manage their home locations. With this plugin, players can easily set multiple home locations, teleport to their homes, and delete them as needed.

## Features

- **Set Home:** Players can use the `/sethome [home]` command to set a home location with a specified name.
- **Teleport Home:** Teleport to a previously set home using the `/home [home]` command.
- **Delete Home:** Remove a home location with the `/delhome [home]` command.
- **Home List:** Players can view a list of their set home locations with the `/homelist` command.

## Installation

1. Place the this plugin .jar file in your Minecraft plugin server's `plugins` folder.
2. Start or reload your server.

## Usage

- `/sethome [home]`: Set a home location with a name.
- `/home [home]`: Teleport to a previously set home.
- `/delhome [home]`: Delete a home location.
- `/homelist`: View a list of your set home locations.

## Configuration

The plugin's configuration file (`config.yml`) allows you to customize messages and color codes for the plugin.

## Permissions

- `betterhome.sethome`: Allows players to use the `/sethome` command.
- `betterhome.home`: Allows players to use the `/home` command.
- `betterhome.delhome`: Allows players to use the `/delhome` command.
- `betterhome.homelist`: Allows players to use the `/homelist` command.

## Support and Issues

If you encounter any issues or have questions, DM to https://twitter.com/yottaka1203

Enjoy your enhanced experience with BetterHome!
